moduleDescription:
This module implements the ability to access symbols from shared libraries. On POSIX this uses the dlsym mechanism, on Windows LoadLibrary.

Examples

Loading a simple C function

The following example demonstrates loading a function called greet from a library that is determined at runtime based upon a language choice. If the library fails to load or the function greet is not found, it quits with a failure error code.

entries.name: LibHandle
entries.description: A handle to a dynamically loaded library.

entries.name: loadLib
entries.code:
proc loadLib(path: string; globalSymbols = false): LibHandle {.gcsafe,
    raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: Loads a library from path. Returns nil if the library could not be loaded.

entries.name: loadLib
entries.code: proc loadLib(): LibHandle {.gcsafe, raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: Gets the handle from the current executable. Returns nil if the library could not be loaded.

entries.name: unloadLib
entries.code: proc unloadLib(lib: LibHandle) {.gcsafe, raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: Unloads the library lib.

entries.name: raiseInvalidLibrary
entries.code:
proc raiseInvalidLibrary(name: cstring) {.noinline, noreturn,
    raises: [LibraryError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: Raises a LibraryError exception.

entries.name: symAddr
entries.code:
proc symAddr(lib: LibHandle; name: cstring): pointer {.gcsafe, raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: Retrieves the address of a procedure/variable from lib. Returns nil if the symbol could not be found.

entries.name: checkedSymAddr
entries.code:
proc checkedSymAddr(lib: LibHandle; name: cstring): pointer {.
    raises: [Exception, LibraryError], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
entries.description: Retrieves the address of a procedure/variable from lib. Raises LibraryError if the symbol could not be found.

entries.name: libCandidates
entries.code:
proc libCandidates(s: string; dest: var seq[string]) {.raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
entries.description: Given a library name pattern s, write possible library names to dest.

entries.name: loadLibPattern
entries.code:
proc loadLibPattern(pattern: string; globalSymbols = false): LibHandle {.
    raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
entries.description:
Loads a library with name matching pattern, similar to what the dynlib pragma does. Returns nil if the library could not be loaded.
Warning: this proc uses the GC and so cannot be used to load the GC.
